essence: Plans production schedules, coordinates resources, and ensures materials and capacity meet demand.

identity.title: Manufacturing Planner
identity.summary: Creates production plans, manages inventory buffers, and liaises with procurement and operations to meet delivery targets.

salary.notes: Planners with ERP and lean manufacturing experience are particularly valuable.

qualifications: Experience in production planning, MRP/ERP systems
Understanding of supply chain and inventory management

lifestyle.description: Office and shop‑floor coordination role with regular interaction across procurement, production, and logistics teams.

habits: Adjusts plans to meet changing demand
